title: Trigger automation from Mirrored column
excerpt:

posts.author: nathanru (Nathan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I connect different boards all the time, and use a lot mirrored columns. I would like to be able to use a mirrored column as a trigger to do things. Yesterday, I was trying to create an automation where, when the mirrored column changes OR is something, then move to a specific group.

This cannot be done right now, I check with support.

Anyone ideas about workarounds, or can this be added to the roadmap?

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
We like to use an app called ‘Column Magic’ that allows us to copy the mirror column value and paste it to a suitable column type.

It has something like 100 free actions in a month, with low cost volume based subscription after that.

Check it out and let us know if you get stuck

teameasy@easy-mondays.com

I connect different boards all the time, and use a lot mirrored columns. I would like to be able to use a mirrored column as a trigger to do things. Yesterday, I was trying to create an automation where, when the mirrored column changes OR is something, then move to a specific group.

Hi @nathanru actually it is possible. I have published an article here to serve as your guide.

posts.author: alakkotrypis (Alexander Lakkotrypis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey!
I just posted this so I thought I’d give you the link to read as well. If you search for “280” in the templates you can find the automation formula for " When [mirror] status changes to something change another status to something"

Mirror Status as a trigger to an automation EXISTS: Search for "280" Platform discussions
I’ve noticed a lot of questions about using mirror columns as triggers for automations, which got me a bit confused because I use them all the time without any issues I thought it might be helpful to share that mirrored statuses can indeed be triggers, you are only 1 search term away from them! When searching for “mirror” in the templates or while building an automation, it returns an empty search result. See below: When doing the automation from scratch & searching for “mirror” it do…

As for the 2nd scenario, you could use this mirrored status to show a specific status [strictly for automation purposes], the board B would see this status and trigger another automation which connects all boards A & C with B, and then change back the status to whatever it is you wish it to be showing as.

For example:
In our case we manage engineers and in-field services. In our masterboard we have multiple services but in each engineers board you have only their own services. Sometimes we want to reassign engineers, or reset the data in both boards. I set up a Status column called [AUTOMATION STATUS] which is basically keyword/commands for the Engineers board’s automations to pick up and either delete the item or duplicate or connect to other boards etc. All because of this mirrored column status as a trigger:

Screenshot 2024-09-02 1726261506×625 72.9 KB

I hope this helps

posts.cookedHtml:
